scripts.build:shared: npm run build -w @ledgerread/contracts && npm run build -w @ledgerread/crypto && npm run build -w @ledgerread/db
scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @ledgerread/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @ledgerread/web
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.test:web: npm run build:shared && npm run test -w @ledgerread/web
